nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI more as a collaborator. I don't like to hand over the reins entirely!

nodes.label: AI for low-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Rather than spending time on things that might matter a bit less, such as headings, my time can be spent on the body of the text.

nodes.label: AI as comprehension aid for unfamiliar topics
nodes.grounding_span: I asked some LLMs to explain the concepts to me in a simplified manner so that I had a clearer idea before I started writing.

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to think it's me who is driving the decisions.

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that it will make copywriting obsolete in the next few years.

nodes.label: Value of human connection and trust in client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that people will still want that human connection with writing and that relationships that have been forged with my clients based on trust will continue.

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to be proactive and have a high level of accountability in my work.

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it has helped me to become more efficient.

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: it was nice to get some clarity.

nodes.label: Professional sustainability and client trust
nodes.grounding_span: relationships that have been forged with my clients based on trust will continue.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI more as a collaborator.

nodes.label: Positive appreciation of AI for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it has helped me to become more efficient.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for comprehension
nodes.grounding_span: I found this really helpful and insightful.

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing human control
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want the AI to be doing everything for me.

nodes.label: Worry about AI's negative impact on jobs
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that it will make copywriting obsolete in the next few years.

nodes.label: Positive stance toward preserving human connection
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that people will still want that human connection with writing.

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: there is always substantial editing and human input.

nodes.label: Proactive accountability — maintaining high level of responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to be proactive and have a high level of accountability in my work.
